name: Dasheen Leaf Potted Artificial Plant - Room Essentials™
description:
Add a natural charm to your indoor space with this Dasheen Leaf Potted Artificial Plant from Room Essentials™. This artificial arrangement features a realistic-looking dasheen leaf tree, and it comes housed in a white melamine pot with styrofoam filler for instant display. Place it on a side or console table with other real or faux plants to create a relaxing indoor garden.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
